name: control-mapping freshness gate: --skip-fresh bypasses the gate per section 2.17 but writes a bypass entry to C-4 audit log naming the operator
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework nist-csf-2 --control-id GV.OC --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --skip-fresh --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && grep "skip-fresh" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
